items.title: Real-Windows stdin behavior verification
items.description: input.test.ts exercises Windows EAGAIN/EOF only via mocks; cmd.exe, PowerShell, Git Bash, winpty, ConPTY smoke deferred. Pick up after task-003 rebundle.

items.title: POSIX shebang execution smoke for bundled CLI
items.description: plugin/bin/geas shebang + bundle verified only on Windows (Git Bash); macOS/Linux CI smoke not yet run

items.title: Unbounded stdin read
items.description: fs.readFileSync(0) has no size cap; local CLI so no trust boundary crossed, but a future remote/IPC surface could re-expose this

items.title: Dead SyntaxError fallback branches in phase/evolution/recovery
items.description: readInputData already wraps SyntaxError into INVALID_JSON code; err instanceof SyntaxError branches are unreachable residue

items.title: Duplicated readInputData try/catch across 7 commands
items.description: Extract shared readJsonInputOrFail(operation, fileErrCtx) helper in lib/input.ts

items.title: Convention drift: decision.ts uses inner try/catch without --set fallback
items.description: Align decision.ts with mission/phase/evolution/recovery outer-catch pattern; only evidence.ts and task.ts record-add need inner form
